states.name: Perry
states.title: Admiral of Debt
states.description: Perry was born in a prosperous, civilized nation far away. There, advanced technology thrived—rivaling or even surpassing that of Bergaria. Perry's father, both an adventurer and a scientist, played a part in its progress.

states.name: Perry
states.title: Admiral of Debt
states.description: The eyes of the young Perry always sparkled at the sight of the exotic treasures and minerals her father brought back from his expeditions. She worked hard toward her dream, determined to one day become an adventurer who would explore unknown lands. A year ago, she finally obtained government approval and set out as an adventurer. But around that time, her father, Ganon, vanished without a word, leaving no trace.

states.name: Perry
states.title: Admiral of Debt
states.description:
She secured a hefty loan from the government, bought a ship, and set off for the open sea—
However, Perry soon realized the truth: if she returned with nothing to show for it, this would quickly turn into nothing more than a high-interest mega-debt cruise.
Since then, she has kept a sharp, watchful eye day and night to ensure not a single piece of equipment goes missing, and the moment she hears a rumor about treasure, she immediately jumps at the opportunity.
